nodes.name: pg_am.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_am system catalog table exposing available access methods (heap), compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_am catalog.

nodes.name: pg_attrdef.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_attrdef system catalog view exposing column default values, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_attrdef catalog.

nodes.name: pg_attribute.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_attribute system catalog view exposing column metadata for all table-like objects, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_attribute catalog.

nodes.name: pg_cast.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_cast system catalog view listing available type casts, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_cast catalog.

nodes.name: pg_class.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_class system catalog view exposing all relations (tables, views, materialized views, indexes), key for PostgreSQL client compatibility.

nodes.name: pg_collation.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_collation system catalog view listing available collations, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_collation catalog.

nodes.name: pg_constraint.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_constraint system catalog view exposing table constraint metadata, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_constraint catalog.

nodes.name: pg_conversion.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_conversion system catalog view listing encoding conversion procedures, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_conversion catalog.

nodes.name: pg_description.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_description system catalog view providing descriptive comments for database objects, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_description catalog.

nodes.name: pg_enum.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_enum system catalog view listing enum type values, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_enum catalog.

nodes.name: pg_extension.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_extension system catalog view listing installed PostgreSQL extensions, providing compatibility stubs.

nodes.name: pg_index.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_index system catalog view exposing index metadata, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_index catalog.

nodes.name: pg_inherits.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_inherits system catalog view representing table inheritance relationships, providing empty stub for PostgreSQL compatibility.

nodes.name: pg_matviews.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_matviews system catalog view listing all materialized views, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_matviews catalog.

nodes.name: pg_namespace.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_namespace system catalog view exposing schemas/namespaces, critical for PostgreSQL schema resolution compatibility.

nodes.name: pg_opclass.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_opclass system catalog view listing operator class entries, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_opclass catalog.

nodes.name: pg_operator.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_operator system catalog view listing available operators, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_operator catalog.

nodes.name: pg_proc.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_proc system catalog view listing all database functions and procedures, compatible with PostgreSQL's pg_proc catalog.

nodes.name: pg_settings.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the pg_settings system catalog view dynamically listing all server configuration parameters with their values and metadata.
